subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! Thy services at the Sacred Threshold are recognized and recorded, and thy strivings in the path of God are written [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان خدماتت در آستان مقدس معروف و مثبوت و مساعیت در سبیل الهی
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @praise and encouragement, @call to action, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
